engine = create_engine\('postgresql://postgres:123456@localhost:5432/sabaform'\)

    r = conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'events' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\)\)

        print\(row[0]\)
